query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `morning_briefings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `topLeads` text,
  `pipelineAlerts` text,
  `nextActions` text,
  `dismissed` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `generatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
